headline: Inside Alts: Private equity's new market boom
summary: CNBC's Robert Frank reports on how troubles in private equity and private credit have created a booming new market for secondaries.

headline: The Fed’s 2026 Cutting Path Will Make or Break PFFA’s 9.5% Yield
summary: The Virtus InfraCap U.S. Preferred Stock ETF (NYSEARCA:PFFA) sits at $21.62 heading into the back half of 2026, paying a 9.5% yield that has drawn income investors looking for something between bond coupons and common stock dividends. PFFA raised its monthly payout to $0.1725 per share for 2026, up from $0.17 in 2025, extending a ... The Fed’s 2026 Cutting Path Will Make or Break PFFA’s 9.5% Yield

headline: Big Four Private Equity Sentiment Tanks On Slow Exits, Private Credit Stress
summary: Sentiment sunk to a multiyear low on the first-quarter earnings calls held by private equity's Big Four listed firms. Click here to read more.

headline: Iran war a 'speed bump' for GCC growth, says former Bahrain industry minister
summary: Zayed Alzayani, the Chairman of Alzayani Investments and the former Bahrain minister of industry, commerce and tourism, remains positive on the investment picture in the Gulf. Speaking to CNBC's Dan Murphy at the sidelines of the Citi Pan-Asia conference, Alzayani says that "fundamentals are still very strong in the Gulf" and adds that the GCC remains a "very sound proposition" for investors.
